description: Automated in-place upgrade from Windows Server 2016 to 2019. Supports 17 OS languages. Pre-flight checks, AMI backup, driver updates (ENA/PV/NVMe), in-place upgrade via AWS media, deterministic pinned OS + .NET cumulative updates (so the box is not left at the 2019 baseline), and cleanup. InstallCumulativeUpdates=false skips patching. DryRun=true runs checks only.

InstanceId.description: (Required) EC2 instance ID to upgrade. Must be running Windows Server 2016.

AutomationAssumeRole.description: (Optional) IAM role ARN the automation assumes - select WindowsUpgradeAutomationRole (created per iam-roles.md). It needs EC2, SSM, IAM, and SNS permissions. If left empty, the run uses the invoking user's identity, whose temporary credentials can expire during this long, multi-reboot upgrade - so providing the role is strongly recommended.

BackupRetentionDays.description: (Optional) Number of days to retain the pre-upgrade backup AMI. The AMI is tagged with a DeleteAfter date and deprecated after this period.

UpgradeInstanceProfileName.description: (Optional) Instance profile attached ONLY if the target instance has no IAM role; removed at the end of the run. Never used when the instance already has an SSM-capable role. May be an existing SSM-enabled instance profile (must carry AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore) - useful when you cannot create new IAM resources. If set to a profile other than the default, the automation role's iam:PassRole must allow the role inside it.

WaitForBackupAMI.description: (Optional) Wait for backup AMI to reach available state before proceeding. Set to false for faster execution.

NotificationTopicArn.description: (Optional) SNS topic ARN for success and rollback notifications. (A plain failure without rollback does not publish.)

InstallCumulativeUpdates.description: (Optional) Install pinned OS + .NET cumulative updates after upgrade so the instance is not left at the 2019 media baseline. false = skip patching for a faster run and use your own process. Defender self-updates regardless. Best-effort: a patch failure does not fail the run (the OS upgrade is the goal); the box is left upgraded and you apply the CU via your own process.

PinnedCumulativeUpdateUrl.description: (Optional) Microsoft Update Catalog .msu URL of the Server 2019 OS cumulative update (combined SSU+LCU, x64). Upgrade media lands at 17763.737; WU delays surfacing the current CU, so this installs it deterministically. Default = June 2026 (KB5094123). See README to obtain a newer URL. Empty = skip OS CU. The KB id is parsed from the URL for logging.

PinnedDotNetUpdateUrl.description: (Optional) Catalog .msu URL of the Server 2019 .NET Framework cumulative update (x64). Upgrade resets in-box .NET 4.7.2 to Sept-2019; this brings it current. Default = KB5087061 (.NET 3.5/4.7.2). Empty = skip .NET CU. The KB id is parsed from the URL for logging.

DryRun.description: (Optional) Run pre-flight checks only without making any changes to the instance.

AutoRollback.description: (Optional) Automatically restore the original root volume from the backup AMI if the upgrade fails.

inputs.Script:
def script_handler(events, context):
  return {'Region': events['AZ'][:-1]}

import boto3
import time

def script_handler(events, context):
  ssm = boto3.client('ssm', region_name=events['Region'])
  instance_id = events['InstanceId']
  
  # Wait for SSM agent to go offline (reboot initiated by CreateImage)
  print('Waiting for reboot to initiate...')
  for i in range(30):
    time.sleep(5)
    info = ssm.describe_instance_information(Filters=[{'Key': 'InstanceIds', 'Values': [instance_id]}])['InstanceInformationList']
    if not info or info[0].get('PingStatus') != 'Online':
      print(f'Agent went offline after {(i+1)*5}s')
      break
  else:
    print('Agent never went offline - reboot may have already completed')
  
  # Now wait for it to come back online
  print('Waiting for SSM agent to come back online...')
  for i in range(60):
    time.sleep(5)
    info = ssm.describe_instance_information(Filters=[{'Key': 'InstanceIds', 'Values': [instance_id]}])['InstanceInformationList']
    if info and info[0].get('PingStatus') == 'Online':
      print(f'Agent back online after {(i+1)*5}s')
      return {'Status': 'Online'}
  raise Exception('SSM agent did not come back online after reboot')

import boto3
import time

def script_handler(events, context):
  instance_id = events['InstanceId']
  region = events['Region']
  ec2 = boto3.client('ec2', region_name=region)
  ssm = boto3.client('ssm', region_name=region)
  
  check_script = '''$freeGB = [math]::Round((Get-PSDrive C).Free / 1GB, 2)
$cPartition = Get-Partition -DriveLetter C
$diskNumber = $cPartition.DiskNumber
$allPartitions = Get-Partition -DiskNumber $diskNumber | Where-Object { $_.Type -ne 'Reserved' -and $_.Size -gt 1MB }
$partitionCount = ($allPartitions | Measure-Object).Count
$lastPartition = $allPartitions | Sort-Object -Property Offset | Select-Object -Last 1
$cIsLast = ($lastPartition.DriveLetter -eq 'C')
$diskInfo = Get-Disk -Number $diskNumber
$canExtendGB = [math]::Round(((Get-PartitionSupportedSize -DriveLetter C).SizeMax - $cPartition.Size) / 1GB, 2)
Write-Output "$freeGB|$partitionCount|$cIsLast|$($diskInfo.PartitionStyle)|$canExtendGB"'''
  
  response = ssm.send_command(InstanceIds=[instance_id], DocumentName='AWS-RunPowerShellScript', Parameters={'commands': [check_script]})
  cmd_id = response['Command']['CommandId']
  for _ in range(30):
    time.sleep(2)
    result = ssm.get_command_invocation(CommandId=cmd_id, InstanceId=instance_id)
    if result['Status'] in ['Success', 'Failed']: break
  if result['Status'] != 'Success':
    raise Exception(f'Disk check failed: {result.get("StandardErrorContent", "")}')
  
  parts = result['StandardOutputContent'].strip().split('|')
  free_gb, partition_count, c_is_last, partition_style, can_extend_gb = float(parts[0]), int(parts[1]), parts[2] == 'True', parts[3], float(parts[4])
  
  if free_gb >= 20:
    return {'NeedsExpansion': 'false', 'NeedsPartitionExtend': 'false', 'VolumeId': '', 'NewVolumeSize': 0, 'Message': f'{free_gb}GB free'}
  
  needed_gb = 25 - free_gb
  if can_extend_gb >= needed_gb:
    return {'NeedsExpansion': 'false', 'NeedsPartitionExtend': 'true', 'VolumeId': '', 'NewVolumeSize': 0, 'Message': 'Will extend partition'}
  
  if partition_count > 1 and not c_is_last:
    raise Exception('Cannot expand - C: is not last partition')
  
  instance = ec2.describe_instances(InstanceIds=[instance_id])['Reservations'][0]['Instances'][0]
  volume_id = next((bdm['Ebs']['VolumeId'] for bdm in instance['BlockDeviceMappings'] if bdm['DeviceName'] == instance['RootDeviceName']), None)
  if not volume_id: raise Exception('Could not find root volume')
  
  volume = ec2.describe_volumes(VolumeIds=[volume_id])['Volumes'][0]
  new_size = volume['Size'] + int(needed_gb - can_extend_gb) + 1
  if partition_style == 'MBR' and new_size > 2048: raise Exception('Cannot expand beyond 2TB - MBR limit')
  
  return {'NeedsExpansion': 'true', 'NeedsPartitionExtend': 'true', 'VolumeId': volume_id, 'NewVolumeSize': new_size, 'Message': f'Expanding to {new_size}GB'}

import boto3
import time
def script_handler(events, context):
  region = events['Region']
  instance_id = events['InstanceId']
  ssm = boto3.client('ssm', region_name=region)
  cmd = ssm.send_command(InstanceIds=[instance_id], DocumentName='AWS-RunPowerShellScript', Parameters={'commands': ['(Get-WmiObject Win32_OperatingSystem).OSLanguage']})
  cmd_id = cmd['Command']['CommandId']
  for _ in range(15):
    time.sleep(2)
    r = ssm.get_command_invocation(CommandId=cmd_id, InstanceId=instance_id)
    if r['Status'] in ['Success','Failed']: break
  lcid = r.get('StandardOutputContent','').strip()
  lcid_map = {'1028':'Chinese_Traditional','1029':'Czech','1031':'German','1033':'English','1034':'Spanish','1036':'French','1038':'Hungarian','1040':'Italian','1041':'Japanese','1042':'Korean','1043':'Dutch','1045':'Polish','1046':'Portuguese_Brazil','1049':'Russian','1053':'Swedish','1055':'Turkish','2070':'Portuguese_Portugal','3082':'Spanish'}
  lang = lcid_map.get(lcid)
  if not lang: raise Exception(f'Unsupported OS language LCID: {lcid}. Supported: {list(lcid_map.values())}')
  desc = f'Windows 2019 {lang} Installation Media'
  print(f'OS language: {lcid} -> {lang}')
  ec2 = boto3.client('ec2', region_name=region)
  response = ec2.describe_snapshots(OwnerIds=['amazon'], Filters=[{'Name': 'description', 'Values': [desc]}])
  if not response['Snapshots']: raise Exception(f'No snapshot found for: {desc}')
  return {'SnapshotId': sorted(response['Snapshots'], key=lambda x: x['StartTime'], reverse=True)[0]['SnapshotId']}

commands: if (-not $diskDrive) { throw "Could not find disk for $volId" }
if ($iso) { $m = Mount-DiskImage -ImagePath $iso.FullName -PassThru; $driveLetter = ($m | Get-Volume).DriveLetter; Write-Output "Mounted ISO as ${driveLetter}:" }
$idx = if ($os -match 'Datacenter') { if ($isCore) { 3 } else { 4 } } else { if ($isCore) { 1 } else { 2 } }
if (Get-Process SetupHost -EA SilentlyContinue) { Write-Output 'Upgrade started' } else { Write-Output 'SetupHost not detected yet' }
if ($ssu) { Write-Output ('  Installing SSU: ' + (Split-Path $ssu -Leaf)); Add-WindowsPackage -Online -PackagePath $ssu -NoRestart | Out-Null }
if (-not $lcu) { throw ('LCU cab not found in ' + $kb + ' package') }
Write-Output 'Pinned updates staged; reboot required to finalize'
if (Get-HotFix -Id $osKb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Output ('OK: OS CU ' + $osKb + ' installed'); break }
if (-not $pending -and -not $servicing) { throw ('Pinned OS CU ' + $osKb + ' did not apply: not installed and servicing has settled (RebootPending=False, TiWorker idle).') }
if ((Get-Date) -gt $deadline) { throw ('Timed out waiting for ' + $osKb + ' to finalize (RebootPending=' + $pending + ', servicing=' + $servicing + ').') }

if (Get-HotFix -Id $netKb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Output ('OK: .NET ' + $netKb + ' installed') } else { Write-Output ('WARNING: .NET ' + $netKb + ' not in hotfix list (may be not-applicable on this .NET version)') }
Write-Output "Recovery partition removed and C: extended"

def script_handler(events, context):
  raise Exception(f"Upgrade failed. Backup AMI: {events['BackupAmiId']}. AutoRollback disabled.")
